title: cuscuta planiflora var. planiflora
intro: Cuscuta planiflora var. planiflora is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as a type of dodder plant. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Cuscuta planiflora var. planiflora is often used in the form of capsules, tablets, or infusions to leverage its medicinal properties and provide potential health benefits.
